title: China asserts need for more power as Donald Trump embraces war
summary_full: Chinese analysts believe the US would not target Xi Jinping like it did Khamenei due to China's nuclear status. However, Trump's embrace of war reinforces Beijing's view of the US as its primary threat, prompting calls for superior firepower and self-reliance. China also warns against internal threats and deceptive negotiations with Washington.
